description: Frozen QuickGO annotation-search responses (biological_process aspect) for the UniProt accession of each of the 50 NB12 uncovered genes. One entry per gene symbol; each value is the verbatim {numberOfHits, results:[...]} response used by the notebook's Step-3 rule-based mechanism classifier (positive/negative/not_melanin_regulator) frozen per-gene in data/processed/nb12_direction_law_expanded.csv (mech_call/mech_conf/mech_reason columns).
accession_source: mygene_uniprot_resolution.json (Swiss-Prot accession of the top scoring hit per gene)
